Task description textual requirements exactly match these substrings, which are checked by verifier.py
verifier.py uses this value multiplied by 1024 to check the minimum byte size of the .eddx file

privileged_info_summary: The task requires generating a synthetic fashion sketch from a blank canvas in Wondershare EdrawMax. The expected output file paths (/home/ga/Documents/uniform_spec.eddx and /home/ga/Documents/uniform_spec.png) exactly match the task description and export scripts. The required text substrings ('SkyHigh Logistics', 'Embroidered Logo', 'Contrast Pocket', 'Double Stitch') are explicitly mandated by the task instructions and are dynamically verified within the generated EDDX archive's XML content by the verifier script. The minimum expected EDDX file size is verified to be 5 KB by the grading logic.
